data.label: Fake
data.explanation: Ay naku, sis, baliktad ata yung chismis! According to the news, Timberwolves nga ang nanalo sa Game 1, hindi ang Spurs. Grabe, wrong info!
evidence: Multiple sources confirm that the Timberwolves won Game 1 against the Spurs with a score of 104-102.
ESPN, New York Times, and NBA.com all reported the Timberwolves' victory.
data.factCorrection: The claim says the Spurs won Game 1 against the Timberwolves, but according to ESPN, the Timberwolves won 104-102.
